Renamed credential_mode (from allocation_kind + allocation.mode incl. DB columns), hard_limits_by_operation/soft_limits_by_operation (match DB jsonb cols), fixed a double-prefix slip, fixed 4 docstrings. 247 hosted tests pass. Decided NOT to rename subject_id->target_id: it is a generic idempotency-key scope component (video id for ingest, client id for queries) so target_id would misdescribe the query usage; documented the subject vs subject_id distinction in the glossary instead.

Verify-and-document outcome (no rename). Confirmed token_version is string-consistent across all TS and never crosses to the Python int (edge validates its own OAuth tokens; Python API trusts edge headers). grant_id(storage)/connector_grant_id(domain) duality is a deliberate compat design. Added a doc comment above HostedAccountGrant tying it to the Python AccountGrant record and docs/hosted-glossary.md. TS suite 41 pass. A forced rename here would be churn near the auth boundary for no gain.
